name: §2.26 validator fails a template missing one or more required fields and lists the misses
command:
mkdir -p custom && printf -- '---
name: nope
grounding_sources:
  - rag
refusal_template: "x"
---
body
' > custom/bad.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/agents/_customer/validate.sh" --dir custom 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'FAIL bad.md' err.txt && grep -q 'per_turn_cost_target' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
